name: payment-scam-firewall
description: Agent-ready payment email investigation plus safe mailbox setup guidance.
long_description: Adds local MCP tools for Payment Scam Firewall: analyze_payment_email inspects a .eml file and returns SAFE, VERIFY, or DO_NOT_PAY with evidence and human verification steps, while mailbox_connection_guide returns provider setup guidance without accepting credentials. The bridge does not return full email bodies, raw headers, attachment content, or mailbox passwords.

tools.name: analyze_payment_email
tools.description: Analyze a local .eml invoice or payment email and return SAFE, VERIFY, or DO_NOT_PAY with evidence and verification steps.

tools.name: mailbox_connection_guide
tools.description: Return safe mailbox setup guidance for Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo, iCloud, Zoho, Fastmail, Proton, AOL, and generic IMAP.

python_executable.title: Python executable
python_executable.description: Python executable with the project's dependencies installed.
